# NawmeEssences

> Authentic luxury perfume decants in Bangladesh. Decanted from a personal collection of 80+ fragrances across 30 brands. Available in 3ml, 5ml, 10ml, 15ml and 30ml sizes. Order via WhatsApp or Messenger. Delivery nationwide.

## About

NawmeEssences is a personal fragrance decant business based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, run by Nawmee — a CSE student and fragrance enthusiast. All decants are taken directly from authentic personal bottles using a syringe for accurate measurement. Zero adulteration.

- Owner: Nawmee (nawmee02)
- Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh (pickup at Aftabnagar, Banasree, NSU)
- Contact: WhatsApp +8801738221686 | Messenger facebook.com/NawmeEssences
- Facebook Page: facebook.com/NawmeEssences

## Pages

- [Home](https://nawmeessences.me/): Featured bestsellers and new releases
- [Shop All Fragrances](https://nawmeessences.me/shop.html): Full catalogue of 80+ regular decants with brand/size/tag filters
- [Exclusive Collection](https://nawmeessences.me/exclusive.html): Rare, discontinued and vintage fragrances — full advance required
- [Policies & Info](https://nawmeessences.me/about.html): Delivery charges, payment policy, pickup locations
- [About Nawmee](https://nawmeessences.me/about-me.html): The story behind the collection

## Products

### Regular Collection (80+ fragrances)

Brands carried: Afnan, Al Haramain, Alfred Dunhill, Amouage, Armaf, Azzaro, Bentley, Bvlgari, Davidoff, Dior, Dolce & Gabbana, French Avenue, Giorgio Armani, Gucci, Gulf Orchid, Hugo Boss, Jean Paul Gaultier, Lalique, Lattafa, Mancera, Mercedes Benz, Nautica, Prada, Rasasi, Rayhaan, Riiffs, Yves Saint Laurent, and more.

Standard sizes: 3ml · 5ml · 10ml · 15ml · 30ml

### Exclusive Collection (rare & discontinued)

Selected rare pieces including:
- Jacques Bogart Silver Scent Pure
- Alfred Dunhill Icon
- Dolce & Gabbana Light Blue Eau Intense
- JPG Le Male In The Navy (2018 formulation)
- JPG Ultra Male (old formulation)
- Giorgio Armani Acqua di Gio Profondo (2020)
- Giorgio Armani Acqua di Gio Absolu
- Dior Homme Sport (2017 formulation)
- Dior Homme Intense
- Gucci Guilty Elixir

Full advance payment required for all exclusive items.

## Pricing & Delivery

| Size | Starting price (BDT) |
|------|----------------------|
| 3ml  | ৳150                 |
| 5ml  | ৳220                 |
| 10ml | ৳380                 |
| 15ml | ৳560                 |
| 30ml | ৳1,090               |

Delivery charges:
- Within Dhaka: ৳70
- Dhaka Suburb: ৳90
- Outside Dhaka (nationwide): ৳120

Payment policy:
- Minimum advance = delivery charge
- Orders above ৳2,000: 30% advance required
- Exclusive/rare items: 100% advance required
- Prices are fixed — no negotiation

## How to Order

1. Browse the shop at nawmeessences.me/shop.html
2. Add items to cart and fill in name, phone, and delivery address
3. Click "Order via WhatsApp" or "Order via Messenger"
4. A pre-filled order message is sent — confirm availability and pay advance
5. Order dispatched after advance confirmation
